Bindings.Binding: if WicksTotems and WicksTotems.UI and WicksTotems.UI.Toggle then WicksTotems.UI:Toggle() end
if WicksTotems and WicksTotems.TotemBar and WicksTotems.TotemBar.Toggle then WicksTotems.TotemBar:Toggle() end

if InCombatLockdown() then return end local list = WicksTotemsCharDB and WicksTotemsCharDB.presets if not list or #list == 0 then return end WicksTotemsCharDB.activePreset = ((WicksTotemsCharDB.activePreset or 0) % #list) + 1 WicksTotems:Emit("PRESET_CHANGED") local p = list[WicksTotemsCharDB.activePreset] print("|cff4FC778Wick's Totems|r preset: " .. (p.name or "?"))
